Klasse BoardScreenPanel

java.lang.Object
view.BoardScreenPanel
public class BoardScreenPanel extends Object
This class creates the board screen panel for the game, which includes the game board, timer settings, and control buttons.

  • Methodendetails

    • createBoardScreen

      public static JPanel createBoardScreen(CardLayout cardLayout, JPanel cardPanel, String mode, DifficultyStrategy difficulty)
      Creates the Board Screen JPanel
      Parameter:
      cardLayout - The CardLayout for switching between panels.
      cardPanel - The main panel containing all cards.
      mode - The game mode (e.g., "singleplayer", "multiplayer").
      difficulty - The difficulty strategy for the game.
      Gibt zurück:
      The board screen panel.
      Siehe auch:
      • createTopPanel(String, DifficultyStrategy)
      • createBoardPanel()
      • createButtonPanel(CardLayout, JPanel)

    • createTopPanel

      private static JPanel createTopPanel(String mode, DifficultyStrategy difficulty)
      Helper method for the createBoardScreen(CardLayout, JPanel, String, DifficultyStrategy) method.

      Creates the top panel containing the timer settings and game prompt.

      Parameter:
      mode - The game mode (e.g., "singleplayer", "multiplayer").
      difficulty - The difficulty strategy for the game.
      Gibt zurück:
      The top panel with timer settings and game prompt.
      Siehe auch:
      • createSliderPanel(String, DifficultyStrategy)
      • createTimePromptPanel()

    • createSliderPanel

      private static JPanel createSliderPanel(String mode, DifficultyStrategy difficulty)
      Helper method for the createTopPanel(String, DifficultyStrategy) method.

      Creates a panel with a slider for setting the time per turn and a button to start the game.

      Parameter:
      mode - The game mode (e.g., "singleplayer", "multiplayer").
      difficulty - The difficulty strategy for the game.
      Gibt zurück:
      The slider panel with time settings and start button.
      Siehe auch:
      • createStartButton(String, DifficultyStrategy)

    • createStartButton

      private static JButton createStartButton(String mode, DifficultyStrategy difficulty)
      Helper method for the createSliderPanel(String, DifficultyStrategy) method.

      Creates a button to start the game with the specified mode and difficulty.

      Parameter:
      mode - The game mode (e.g., "singleplayer", "multiplayer").
      difficulty - The difficulty strategy for the game.
      Gibt zurück:
      The button to start the game.

    • createTimePromptPanel

      private static JPanel createTimePromptPanel()
      Helper method for the createTopPanel(String, DifficultyStrategy) method.

      Creates a panel with a prompt message and a label to display the remaining time.

      Gibt zurück:
      The panel with game prompt and remaining time label.

    • createBoardPanel

      private static JPanel createBoardPanel()
      Helper method for the createBoardScreen(CardLayout, JPanel, String, DifficultyStrategy) method.

      Creates the board panel containing the game board.

      Gibt zurück:
      The board panel with the game board.

    • createButtonPanel

      private static JPanel createButtonPanel(CardLayout cardLayout, JPanel cardPanel)
      Helper method for the createBoardScreen(CardLayout, JPanel, String, DifficultyStrategy) method.

      Creates the button panel containing control buttons for the game.

      Parameter:
      cardLayout - The CardLayout for switching between panels.
      cardPanel - The main panel containing all cards.
      Gibt zurück:
      The button panel with control buttons.
